title: Graph Neural Networks for Program Analysis
abstract: This computer science paper studies graph neural networks for source code analysis, vulnerability detection, and program representation learning. It compares graph encoders with sequence baselines and reports stronger structural reasoning on software engineering tasks.

title: Transformer Retrieval for Question Answering Systems
abstract: This arXiv computer science paper proposes transformer-based dense retrieval for question answering. It discusses indexing, negative sampling, retrieval augmented generation, evaluation metrics, and follow-up question handling in open-domain systems.

title: Efficient Fine Tuning of Open Source Language Models
abstract: This paper evaluates parameter efficient fine tuning for open source language models. It compares LoRA adapters, prompt tuning, and full fine tuning on summarization and explanation generation tasks.
